name: CDW Corporation
analysis: CDW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $133.5900, stop $117.7902, target $180.9894 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
